programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker's in withdrawal from cigarettes and driving everybody crazy. Jake's girlfriend leaves him for a delivery man. Chris awaits her delivery of Supersculpt Leave-In Hair Conditioner.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Uh oh. Frasier's decision to participate in office gossip has dramatic consequences. Can he undo the damage?

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier is planning his funeral. This obsession with his own death can't be healthy, will he get over it?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon has a revelation when he realises why a song was stuck in his head. Also, Amy invites Dave over for dinner despite their previously awkward date.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Howard and Raj have to decide who will take their extra Star Wars movie ticket, while Sheldon plans something special for Amy's birthday.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Secret Closet
programme.desc: When Joey takes Rachel to the hospital because of pain relating to her pregnancy, he realises that his intense romantic feelings for her are excluding Ross from the joys of impending fatherhood.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Birthing Video
programme.desc: Monica prepares a special Valentine's Day for Chandler, complete with sexy lingerie and racy entertainment; Ross has difficulty informing his girlfriend, Mona, that Rachel has moved in with him.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Tells Rachel
programme.desc: Guilt-ridden Joey finally confesses his love for Rachel to the flabbergasted Ross. The guys agree that Joey should tell Rachel during dinner, regardless of the potential consequences.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: A palm reader turns up at the diner. Much to his own dismay, Becker gets caught up in the excitement and lets her take a look at his palm.

programme.title: Good Chef Bad Chef
programme.desc: Good Chef Bad Chef presents viewers with a range of both healthy and indulgent recipes and meal ideas and lets them decide what is right for them.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Miracle on Third or Fourth Street
programme.desc: After a fight with his family, Frasier chooses to spend Christmas Day at the radio station, but after a few hours listening to Seattle's loneliest and most depressed, he moves on to a seedy diner.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier is surprised and flustered when a neighbour spends the night with Martin, and quickly makes a fool of himself talking about it over the air.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny gets more than she bargained for when Leonard agrees to meet with a psychiatrist on her behalf to make a sale. Meanwhile, Sheldon and Raj collaborate on an astronomical discovery.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After being forced to deal with a sick Sheldon, the rest of the gang try to treat themselves to a Sheldon-free weekend.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Has a Baby
programme.desc: Rachel waits in the hospital maternity ward with an anxious Ross. Then, inspired to conceive a baby of their own, Chandler and Monica search for a private room.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Has a Baby
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler make love after trying several locations in the hospital; Rachel finally gives birth to a beautiful girl; Ross kisses Rachel!

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where No One Proposes
programme.desc: Following Rachel's acceptance of Joey's accidental proposal, confusion reigns as Rachel wonders whether it was the right thing to do. Meanwhile, Phoebe can't seem to mind her own business.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is thrilled when his Meemaw visits, but his excitement fades when she butts heads with Amy. Raj meets a girl at the comic book store who makes him question his relationship with Emily.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy host a Valentine's Day episode of Fun with Flags, Leonard and Penny grapple with getting older, and Howard and Bernadette find a surprise in their hot tub.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette reveals her pregnancy to Howard and the rest of the gang.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gang convince Sheldon to celebrate his birthday and throw him a party.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: A palm reader turns up at the diner. Much to his own dismay, Becker gets caught up in the excitement and lets her take a look at his palm.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Miracle on Third or Fourth Street
programme.desc: After a fight with his family, Frasier chooses to spend Christmas Day at the radio station, but after a few hours listening to Seattle's loneliest and most depressed, he moves on to a seedy diner.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier is surprised and flustered when a neighbour spends the night with Martin, and quickly makes a fool of himself talking about it over the air.

programme.title: Entertainment Tonight
programme.desc: Still the gold standard in entertainment news, ET delivers daily exclusives, red carpet coverage, and celebrity interviews.

programme.title: The Bold & The Beautiful
programme.desc: Hope, Ivy, Will, Katie, Daphne, and Electra are completely shocked by Deke's introduction of Remy. Brooke confronts Deacon about his big decision.

programme.title: The Bold & The Beautiful
programme.desc: Deke pleads with Electra for forgiveness. Beth announces her idea for Hope and Liam's wedding!

programme.title: Good Chef Bad Chef
programme.desc: Mike, Jacq, Tim and Jo create stunning dishes, balancing bold flavours and wholesome ingredients. Every meal is a delight. What will you try first?

programme.title: Farm to Fork
programme.desc: Michael Weldon, Louis Tikaram and Brent Draper take you on a food journey across Australia seeking the finest local produce and share inspiring recipe ideas to ignite your passion for cooking at home.

programme.title: Entertainment Tonight
programme.desc: Still the gold standard in entertainment news, ET delivers daily exclusives, red carpet coverage, and celebrity interviews.

programme.title: The Late Show with Stephen Colbert
programme.desc: Join host Stephen Colbert as he shares his views on a number of trending news updates and catches up with guests to engage in candid conversations.

programme.title: The Late Show with Stephen Colbert
programme.desc: Join host Stephen Colbert as he shares his views on a number of trending news updates and catches up with guests to engage in candid conversations.

programme.title: The Bold & The Beautiful
programme.desc: Electra gives Will an ultimatum. Dylan makes a heartbreaking decision. Brooke urges R.J. to follow his heart.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Steve Harvey hosts Family Feud, bringing hilarious moments and families together to compete for a chance to win up to $20,000 by guessing the most popular answers to questions.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Join Grant Denyer in Deal or No Deal, the high-pressure, high-stakes game of risk versus reward where contestants must beat the Banker to win a huge cash prize of $100,000.

programme.title: Millionaire Hot Seat
programme.desc: Six contestants from Victoria, New South Wales and Queensland take on the hot seat. Amongst them is comedian Paul, blues singer Roy, and doctor Dean - who is amid planning a Big Fat Greek Wedding.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: A palm reader turns up at the diner. Much to his own dismay, Becker gets caught up in the excitement and lets her take a look at his palm.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Miracle on Third or Fourth Street
programme.desc: After a fight with his family, Frasier chooses to spend Christmas Day at the radio station, but after a few hours listening to Seattle's loneliest and most depressed, he moves on to a seedy diner.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier is surprised and flustered when a neighbour spends the night with Martin, and quickly makes a fool of himself talking about it over the air.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is thrilled when his Meemaw visits, but his excitement fades when she butts heads with Amy. Raj meets a girl at the comic book store who makes him question his relationship with Emily.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy host a Valentine's Day episode of Fun with Flags, Leonard and Penny grapple with getting older, and Howard and Bernadette find a surprise in their hot tub.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Tea Leaves
programme.desc: Feeling awkward after revealing his romantic feelings to Rachel, Joey avoids contact with her. Rachel hopes to restore their friendship by telling Joey a big lie about her unborn child.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica becomes inarticulate while giving a toast at her parents' wedding anniversary; Phoebe brings her latest boyfriend who is so enthusiastic about everything that he makes people crazy.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Now that he has returned to starring in the daytime drama Days of Our Lives, Joey is thrilled when his name is used in a Soap Opera Digest crossword puzzle.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John gets frustrated when a childless couple come to him for conception advice and misconstrue everything he says.

programme.title: Good Chef Bad Chef
programme.desc: Good Chef Bad Chef presents viewers with a range of both healthy and indulgent recipes and meal ideas and lets them decide what is right for them.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier looks forward to a hot date with a beautiful model who 'bought' him in a celebrity bachelor auction.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: You Can't Tell a Crook by His Cover
programme.desc: When Roz gets scammed by a con artist, Frasier boasts that he's too smart for such tricks. Martin challenges him to figure out which of his three poker buddies is an ex-convict.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette reveals her pregnancy to Howard and the rest of the gang.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gang convince Sheldon to celebrate his birthday and throw him a party.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey's futile attempts to gain Ross' forgiveness result in emergency hospitalisation; an exhausted Rachel desperately searches for any remedy to quell baby Emma's non-stop crying.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel's constant calls to her baby Emma's paediatrician force him to reject her as a patient. Meanwhile, Chandler plans to move to Tulsa, Oklahoma for work.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe fears losing her latest prospective boyfriend Mike; Chandler is in Oklahoma on a work assignment and Monica surprises him in his hotel room.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon and Howard run into problems when they file for a patent for their infinite persistence gyroscope. Meanwhile, the girls give Raj dating advice when Emily reaches out.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is shocked at a revelation from Sheldon after she buys him a new laptop. Raj sells out Leonard and Howard after they lie to their wives in order to attend an early screening of a movie.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Secrets are revealed when Amy and Sheldon join Penny and Leonard on a weekend cabin trip; Raj is more excited about Howard and Bernadette's impending parenthood than they are.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gang pick sides when a small argument between Leonard and Sheldon erupts into a heated fight during a Game of Thrones viewing party.

programme.title: The Cheap Seats
programme.desc: Taking a fun look at the week that was are hosts Melanie Bracewell and Tim McDonald.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: You Can't Tell a Crook by His Cover
programme.desc: When Roz gets scammed by a con artist, Frasier boasts that he's too smart for such tricks. Martin challenges him to figure out which of his three poker buddies is an ex-convict.

programme.title: Entertainment Tonight
programme.desc: Still the gold standard in entertainment news, ET delivers daily exclusives, red carpet coverage, and celebrity interviews.

programme.title: The Bold & The Beautiful
programme.desc: Ridge and Steffy make a decision about the Hope for the Future line. Remy becomes determined to win Deke's trust back.

programme.title: The Bold & The Beautiful
programme.desc: Sheila assures Steffy that her granddaughter, Luna, is in jail for life. Taylor is affected by Deacon's words.

programme.desc: Mike, Jacq, Tim and Jo create stunning dishes, balancing bold flavours and wholesome ingredients. Every meal is a delight. What will you try first?

programme.desc: Join Stephen Colbert as he shares his views on trending news updates and catches up with guest Neil deGrasse Tyson, Performance by RAYE and Late Show Home Shopping with Jon Stewart.

programme.title: The Late Show with Stephen Colbert
programme.desc: Join The Late Show host Stephen Colbert as he shares his views on a number of trending news updates and catches up with guests Pete Buttigieg and Andy Serkis to engage in candid conversations.

programme.title: The Bold & The Beautiful
programme.desc: Separately, Will and Ivy share their opinions with Electra. Ridge reminds R.J. not to bring his personal life to the office.

programme.desc: Walkley award winner Adam is one of six contestants eager and ready to take on the hot seat in this episode.
